Why would that be!?

We have a God given right to defend ourselves and any elected official that would seek to remove that right should be IMMEDIATELY thrown out of office!

Memorial Day is more than a long weekend.

It's a solemn reminder of the families who received a folded flag, and the heroes who never came home.

We owe them a debt of gratitude that can never be repaid. https://t.co/N9t704srap

This Memorial Day weekend, as we honor those who gave all, I'm fighting for those who served.

I recently voted to fully fund the VA, passed 5 amendments delivering $10M more for our veterans, and protected their 2nd Amendment rights.

Our heroes deserve nothing less.

Today I stood in support of our veterans’ 2nd Amendment rights.

They answered the call to protect our God-given rights.

The least we can do is protect theirs. https://t.co/aRaVDa9InQ

I also discussed President Trump’s border security policy with @cbp @djsgov Deputy Commissioner Ron Vitiello. 

Proud to Back the Blue! https://t.co/8gMY9QrJRF

Now let’s pass no tax on machine guns 🇺🇸

Proud to introduce new legislation that will eliminate the remaining NFA taxes on machine guns and destructive devices. 

Taxing our constitutional rights is unacceptable and unconstitutional, it’s past time we put an end to it! https://t.co/fIMj24uM3r
This would be well deserved for Tina Peters!!
Pass nationwide Voter ID or we'll lose this great country.

assessment.posture: No captured Kurdistan social posture yet
assessment.summary: The local archive has not captured a tweet from this account that matches TOR Phi's Kurdistan Lens terms yet. Capture more timeline pages and targeted Kurdistan searches before drawing a social-media conclusion.
assessment.whatItWasLike: No Kurdistan, Kurds, KRG/IKBY, Erbil, Peshmerga, Northern Iraq, PKK/YPG, Iraq/Syria, Yazidi/Sinjar, or energy-linked tweet is present in the profile window yet.
